name: com.likeon.gas
description: Sigil — a GAS-style action-combat & ability framework for Unity. A GameplayTag-driven state bus connects abilities, attributes, effects, input dispatch, melee & ranged combat, movement, and presentation (GameplayCue, camera blend stack, surface effects). Independent Unity implementation; single-player authoritative logic.

samples.description: 可玩 demo：运行时构建一个完整闭环场景（输入→技能→近战命中→扣血→GameplayCue），WASD 移动 / Shift 冲刺 / 鼠标看 / 空格或左键攻击。导入后打开 GASDemo 场景按 Play 即玩。A playable demo that builds a full input→ability→hit→damage→cue loop at runtime.
